DESCRIPTION

A clear summary of the feature you want.

USE CASE

Describe the situation where this feature would be useful. What problem does it solve for your Chrome extension.

PROPOSED API

If you have ideas about what the method signature or usage would look like, describe it here.

```typescript
// Example usage
TextTransform.newMethod('input');
```

ALTERNATIVES

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.
